description: One who studies under guidance; a person in the process of learning. 'Thunai' names the receptive mind—open, questioning, growing.
sound_symbolism: The word awakens carefully. 'Thu' begins with dental attention, the precise breath of someone learning to see. 'Nai' grounds with patient purpose. A student as someone whose awareness is opening.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo thunai' (students). Learns from 'lumishe' (mentor). Related to 'moloi' (apprentice) but broader.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Student as beginner's mind—the openness that makes learning possible.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Student as apprentice—learning through doing alongside a master.
